name: create_live_stream
description: Create a new live stream with a stream key. Supports RTMP ingest, automatic recording, and low-latency playback.

parameters.name: playback_policy
parameters.description: Array of playback policies. Use 'public' for open access or 'signed' for restricted access.

parameters.name: new_asset_settings
parameters.description: Settings for the asset automatically created when the stream ends. Controls playback policy and encoding of the recording.

parameters.name: latency_mode
parameters.description: Latency mode for the stream. Options are 'low' for sub-5-second latency or 'standard' for normal latency.

parameters.name: reconnect_window
parameters.description: Time in seconds to wait for the stream to reconnect before ending. Default is 60.
